projects.title: AI Embedded QR Code Generator & Decoder
projects.description: An AI-powered system to generate and decode QR codes with enhanced artistic styling. Built with Python and deployed using Streamlit for an interactive web interface.

projects.title: BookHub – AI Book Recommendation System
projects.description: A content-based book recommendation system using NLP techniques such as cosine similarity and vectorization to suggest personalized book recommendations.

projects.title: Fair Care Pharmacy Website
projects.description: A responsive business website developed for a local pharmacy to establish an online presence with contact integration, Google Maps, and WhatsApp access.

projects.title: JavaScript Mastery Guide
projects.description: An interactive JavaScript learning platform covering fundamentals to advanced concepts including asynchronous programming and DOM manipulation with live examples.
